seoTitle: Beachport vs Beaufort — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Beachport and Beaufort. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beachport and Beaufort.
heading: Beachport vs Beaufort — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beachport, South Australia and Beaufort, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beaufort has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Beachport (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beachport or Beaufort safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beachport has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Beaufort scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beachport scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Beaufort scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beachport or Beaufort?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beaufort has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
